data.title: Haun Ventures Sees Growth Amid Mastercard's Acquisition of BVNK
data.description: Haun Ventures has experienced growth despite market trends, driven by Mastercard's acquisition of BVNK. According to PANews, this strategic move has positioned Haun Ventures favorably within the stablecoin sector. The acquisition highlights the increasing interest and investment in stablecoins, which are gaining traction in the financial industry.

data.title: Listed Bitcoin mining companies sold over 32,000 BTC in Q1 2026, exceeding the total for the entire year of 2025.
data.description: Publicly listed Bitcoin mining companies sold a total of over 32,000 BTC in the first quarter of 2026, exceeding the total sell-off for the entire year of 2025 and setting a new quarterly record. According to data from TheMinerMag, the companies involved include MARA, CleanSpark, Riot, Cango, Core Scientific, and Bitdeer. The report also states that the current miner hash rate is approximately $33 per PH/s per day, below the break-even point of around $35 for some mining companies. Furthermore, according to CryptoQuant data, Bitcoin miner reserves have decreased from over 1.86 million BTC since 2023 to approximately 1.8 million BTC. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 75,000 USDT with a 0.01% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2026, 07:02 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 75,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 75,011.539063 USDT, with a narrowed 0.01% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: BNB Price Projections: Potential Gains and Future Targets
data.description: Crypto Patel has highlighted that historical accumulation zones for BNB have often led to significant price increases, with potential targets set at $2,000, $5,000, and $10,000. According to NS3.AI, CoinCodex forecasts BNB reaching $943 by July 2026 and $890.90 by the end of 2026.

data.title: The market capitalization of ASTEROID, a Meme coin on the Ethereum blockchain, briefly surpassed $20 million, and is currently valued at $19.2 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's Meme coin ASTEROID briefly exceeded $20 million, currently trading at $19.2 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks. Meme coins generally lack real-world applications and rely more on speculative hype; caution is advised when entering the market.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Fluctuates Amid U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Talks
data.description:
Bitcoin's price is currently at $74,700, experiencing a 0.4% decline over the past 24 hours. According to BlockBeats, the news of U.S.-Iran ceasefire negotiations has boosted risk sentiment, leading the S&P 500 index to reach a record high on Thursday. U.S. President Donald Trump expressed optimism about a permanent ceasefire, claiming Iran has agreed to abandon its nuclear ambitions, transfer nuclear materials, and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, although Iran has yet to confirm these concessions.

Meanwhile, the market is closely monitoring structural signals behind Bitcoin's price movements. ZeroStack CEO Daniel Reis-Faria noted that the negative funding rates indicate a market heavily shorting Bitcoin. He suggested that if Bitcoin continues to rise under these conditions, many short positions could face forced liquidation, potentially accelerating price increases. Reis-Faria anticipates that if the short base is cleared, Bitcoin could reach $125,000 within the next 30 to 60 days.

On-chain analyst CryptoVizArt offered another perspective, highlighting Bitcoin's "True Market Mean" (TMM), which shows that the average holding cost for active holders is currently above the market price, resulting in overall unrealized losses. Since 2016, persistent breaches of this mean have often coincided with Bitcoin's most severe downturns, including the 2018-2019 bear market (maximum drop of 57%, lasting 282 days) and the 2022-2023 decline following the Luna and FTX collapses (maximum drop of 56%, lasting 339 days).

Analysts suggest that these two assessments are not mutually exclusive. The negative funding rates could trigger a significant price surge, but the structural pressure from active holders' unrealized losses might eventually lead to selling. The future trajectory may depend on whether the U.S.-Iran ceasefire can be extended beyond its expiration next week.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview Model Poses Cybersecurity Threat to Global Banks
data.description: Financial officials have issued a warning regarding the potential cybersecurity risks posed by Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview model to the global banking system. According to Odaily, the model is considered a significant threat to the network defenses of banks worldwide. The concerns highlight the growing challenges in securing financial institutions against advanced AI technologies.

data.title: Financial officials warn that Anthropic Claude Mythos Preview model jeopardizes global banking network defenses.
data.description: Financial officials have warned that Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview model poses a serious threat to the cyber defenses of the global banking system. (Financial Times)

data.title: OKX Agent Trade Kit launches "Market Screening and Position Analysis Suite"
data.description: According to official news, OKX Agent Trade Kit has launched a "Market Screening and Open Interest (OI) Analysis Suite," integrating three core capabilities: panoramic market screening, historical OI analysis for single contracts, and OI anomaly ranking across the entire market. This helps users quickly locate trading targets and track fund flows. The suite supports multi-dimensional screening and OI change rate analysis, assisting in identifying fund inflows and outflows and market trends, improving opportunity capture efficiency. Users can directly invoke relevant functions via natural language, eliminating the need to manually view contract data one by one. It is understood that OKX Agent Trade Kit is an open-source exchange MCP toolset designed for AI agents and professional traders, and previously launched "Skill Square" and a series of functional suites.

data.title: Binance: The Binance Alpha airdrop will be available at 17:00 (UTC+8) today. This airdrop uses an upgraded "Alpha blind box" model.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available to claim starting today at 17:00 (UTC+8). This event uses an upgraded "Alpha Blind Box" model, with the airdrop pool containing tokens from multiple projects. Users holding at least 242 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token reward once. It's first-come, first-served. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. This airdrop has three reward tiers: Regular (80% of the pool), Rare (15%), and Hidden (5%), each corresponding to a different Alpha Blind Box value. Users will be assigned to one tier upon claiming, and rewards will be distributed proportionally based on these tiers. If rewards are not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes.

data.title: Israel Compensates Victims of Attacks to Sustain Economic Stability
data.description: Israel is deploying teams of tax officials to evaluate the damage caused by Iranian and Hezbollah attacks, aiming to provide compensation to affected individuals and maintain economic momentum. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's efforts to address the financial impact of these incidents. The compensation initiative is part of a broader strategy to ensure economic stability amid ongoing security challenges. By swiftly assessing and compensating for damages, Israel seeks to mitigate the economic disruptions caused by these attacks.

data.title: Nasdaq Achieves Record High as Dollar Index Declines Amid Global Developments
data.description:
The Nasdaq Composite Index has reached a new record high, marking its 12th consecutive day of gains. According to PANews, this surge comes amid a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, which has lasted for ten days, and potential talks between the United States and Iran expected over the weekend. Meanwhile, the dollar index continues to decline, with major banks expressing bearish sentiments.

In the tech sector, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) has highlighted the growing importance of CPUs in AI data centers, further fueling interest in AMD and Intel stocks. However, Netflix experienced a nearly 10% drop in after-hours trading.

data.title: Gate launches pre-market trading of CHIP perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate has now launched pre-market trading of CHIP perpetual contracts (USDT settlement), supporting leverage of 1-10x.

data.title: Counterfeit Ledger Nano S Plus Found with Malicious Intent
data.description: A Brazilian security researcher has discovered a counterfeit Ledger Nano S Plus purchased from a Chinese marketplace. According to NS3.AI, the device failed Ledger's Genuine Check upon delivery, indicating it was designed to steal wallet data. The researcher noted that the box's QR code could mislead first-time users to download a malicious version of Ledger Live, which displayed a fake verification screen and exposed seed phrases. Further investigation revealed modified hardware, altered firmware, and the presence of an internal WiFi and Bluetooth antenna.

data.title: CoW Swap Releases Report on Domain Hijacking Incident
data.description:
CoW Swap has published a comprehensive report on a recent domain hijacking incident. According to Foresight News, the event was characterized as a supply chain attack, where the attacker used social engineering tactics targeting the .fi domain registry Traficom and registrar Gandi SAS. This allowed the attacker to redirect the domain's DNS to a Cloudflare server under their control, leading to phishing sites being served to users for several hours.

The CoW Protocol's smart contracts, backend API, solver network, and signature infrastructure remained unaffected, as the attack was confined to the domain registration supply chain level. The team detected the issue within 19 minutes and completed the service migration to cow.finance in approximately 3.5 hours. The domain was fully restored on April 15, with RegistryLock enabled. Preliminary analysis estimates user losses at around $1.2 million.

data.title: A certain HYPE whale unpledged 150,000 HYPE tokens and placed a sell order for 100,000 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a HYPE holder unstaking 150,000 HYPE (worth $6.52 million) and placed a sell order for 100,000 HYPE (worth $4.35 million). This whale still holds 354,303 HYPE (worth $15.42 million) in stake.

data.title: Sui Prioritizes South Korean Market Amid Stablecoin Regulation Clarification
data.description: Sui has identified South Korea as its primary focus within the Asian market, aiming to collaborate with financial institutions and major technology companies once the country's stablecoin regulations are clarified. According to NS3.AI, Sui's strategy includes the development of a won-denominated stablecoin, Bitcoin-based financial products, and the utilization of its Move programming language.

data.title: Bitcoin's Recovery Faces Skepticism from High-Leverage Traders
data.description:
Bitcoin's recent climb above $75,000 is facing skepticism from traders who utilize high leverage. According to Bloomberg, these traders are expressing doubts about the sustainability of the cryptocurrency's recovery. The concerns arise from the perception that the rally lacks the necessary support from key market participants who typically drive significant price movements.

The skepticism among leveraged traders highlights a broader uncertainty in the cryptocurrency market. Despite Bitcoin's impressive recovery, the lack of confidence from these influential traders suggests potential volatility ahead. This sentiment reflects a cautious approach, as traders weigh the risks associated with high leverage against the potential for further gains. The situation underscores the complex dynamics at play in the cryptocurrency market, where sentiment can shift rapidly based on various factors, including regulatory developments and macroeconomic trends.

data.title: Osmosis to Remain Independent After Proposal Rejection
data.description:
Cosmos ecosystem decentralized exchange (DEX) Osmosis announced that its proposal to migrate to Cosmos Hub was not approved. According to Foresight News, Osmosis will continue to operate as an independent and profitable chain. In the coming weeks, the team will focus on the next phase of Osmosis, prioritizing user safety and business continuity.

Previously, Osmosis had updated its Cosmos Hub proposal based on feedback from validators and the community. The most significant change was the decision not to mint additional ATOM. Instead, the required ATOM will be gradually purchased on the open market using revenue from the Osmosis DEX protocol for OSMO/ATOM conversion. The total acquisition will remain limited to less than 2.5% of the total ATOM supply.

data.title: Claw Wallet Collaborates to Enhance AI Agent Ecosystem
data.description:
Claw Wallet has announced a strategic collaboration with TagAI and TagClaw to advance the AI Agent ecosystem. According to ChainCatcher, the partnership aims to integrate Claw Wallet's secure AI-native infrastructure with TagAI's AI-driven community layer and TagClaw's on-chain social collaboration network. This integration seeks to establish new standards for AI Agent ecosystems.

The collaboration focuses on incorporating TagClaw's Skill into Claw Wallet, enhancing the intelligent coordination capabilities of AI Agents for seamless and secure on-chain interactions with social attributes. The three parties are currently working on building decentralized AI Agent infrastructure on the BNB Chain, aiming to transform AI Agents from standalone tools into a collaborative social network.
